request.description:
Creates a new booking in the Restful Booker service.

## Endpoint

`POST https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking`

## Required headers

- `Content-Type: application/json`
    
- `Accept: application/json` (recommended)
    

## Request body (JSON)

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `firstname` | string | Yes | Guest first name. |
| `lastname` | string | Yes | Guest last name. |
| `totalprice` | number | Yes | Total booking price. |
| `depositpaid` | boolean | Yes | Whether a deposit has been paid. |
| `bookingdates` | object | Yes | Booking date range. |
| `bookingdates.checkin` | string (YYYY-MM-DD) | Yes | Check-in date. |
| `bookingdates.checkout` | string (YYYY-MM-DD) | Yes | Check-out date. |
| `additionalneeds` | string | No | Free-form additional needs (e.g., meals). |

## Example request

``` http
POST /booking HTTP/1.1
Host: restful-booker.herokuapp.com
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json
{
  "firstname": "QA",
  "lastname": "Journey",
  "totalprice": 111,
  "depositpaid": true,
  "bookingdates": {
    "checkin": "2026-01-01",
    "checkout": "2026-01-02"
  },
  "additionalneeds": "Breakfast"
}

 ```

## 200 OK response

Returns the newly created booking ID and the created booking object.

### Response fields

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `bookingid` | number | Unique ID for the created booking. |
| `booking` | object | Echo of the created booking data. |
| `booking.firstname` | string | Guest first name. |
| `booking.lastname` | string | Guest last name. |
| `booking.totalprice` | number | Total booking price. |
| `booking.depositpaid` | boolean | Whether a deposit has been paid. |
| `booking.bookingdates` | object | Booking date range. |
| `booking.bookingdates.checkin` | string | Check-in date. |
| `booking.bookingdates.checkout` | string | Check-out date. |
| `booking.additionalneeds` | string | Additional needs. |

## Example 200 response

``` json
{
  "bookingid": 3519,
  "booking": {
    "firstname": "QA",
    "lastname": "Journey",
    "totalprice": 111,
    "depositpaid": true,
    "bookingdates": {
      "checkin": "2026-01-01",
      "checkout": "2026-01-02"
    },
    "additionalneeds": "Breakfast"
  }
}

 ```
